title: Space Base
prompt: Lunar Base Alpha with 1000 crew, nuclear power, landing pads, life support and launch logistics
executive_summary: Space Base has been classified as Surface Habitat/Base in Moon / Lunar Surface. CASEY estimates $181.7B P50 cost, $145.3B to $236.2B range, 224 month baseline, Extreme risk and 46% confidence under the Base scenario.
confidence_explanation: Class 3 Budget Authorization: 10-40% definition maturity drives the starting confidence level.
Schedule Level 4: more detailed schedule logic improves QSRA traceability.
Location/space factor: Moon / Lunar Surface applies a 2.90 delivery premium.

risks.title: Mass growth
risks.mitigation: Mass control board and margin policy
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 01.05 ECLSS / Life Support exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (4%/11%/24%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to A1500 Procurement strategy and tender packaging with O/M/P delay 15/50/140 days and critical path sensitivity.

risks.title: Market escalation
risks.description: Inflation and commodity escalation exceeds allowance
risks.mitigation: Early procurement, index strategy, market testing
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 01.08 Launch Services exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (4%/10%/20%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to A1800 Site / launch integration readiness with O/M/P delay 0/0/0 days and critical path sensitivity.

risks.title: Life-support reliability
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 01.06 Payload / Mission Equipment exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (5%/12%/28%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to A1600 Detailed design / IFC development with O/M/P delay 20/70/180 days and critical path sensitivity.

risks.title: Launch manifest delay
risks.mitigation: Reserve alternate slots, freeze payload interfaces
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 01.04 Power Generation & Distribution exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (3%/9%/20%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to A1400 Planning, regulatory and stakeholder approvals with O/M/P delay 15/45/120 days and critical path sensitivity.

risks.title: Design maturity gap
risks.description: Design maturity lower than estimate basis
risks.mitigation: Design maturity gates and independent review
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 02.01 Test & Qualification Facilities exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (3%/9%/18%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to A2000 Systems integration and testing with O/M/P delay 15/45/120 days and critical path sensitivity.

risks.title: Scope growth
risks.description: Requirements mature late causing additions and rework
risks.mitigation: Freeze scope, change board, value gates
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 01.07 Robotics / Autonomous Construction exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (3%/8%/16%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to A1700 Long-lead procurement with O/M/P delay 15/45/120 days and critical path sensitivity.

risks.title: Productivity underperformance
risks.description: Labour productivity below plan due to access/sequence
risks.mitigation: Package productivity controls and daily planning
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 02.03 Programme Management / PMO exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (3%/8%/16%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to P1000 Launch campaign with O/M/P delay 15/50/130 days and critical path sensitivity.

risks.title: Supply chain delay
risks.description: Long-lead equipment or specialist suppliers slip
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 02.02 Safety & Mission Assurance exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (2%/7%/15%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to A2100 Commissioning, operations readiness and closeout with O/M/P delay 10/40/120 days and critical path sensitivity.

risks.title: Interface misalignment
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 03.02 Management Reserve exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (2%/7%/14%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to P3000 Power and ECLSS with O/M/P delay 10/35/100 days and critical path sensitivity.

risks.title: Commissioning delay
risks.description: Systems integration and tests take longer than plan
risks.mitigation: Commissioning readiness and early test plans
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 03.01 Risk Contingency / UFE exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (2%/6%/12%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to P2000 Payload integration with O/M/P delay 10/35/100 days and critical path sensitivity.

risks.title: Permits / approvals delay
risks.description: Authorities or stakeholders delay critical approvals
risks.mitigation: Authority plan, consent tracker, early submissions
risks.basis_of_cost_impact: Cost impact derived from 01.09 Transport / Landing / Surface Logistics exposure, project P50 $181.7B, and risk severity (1%/4%/8%).
risks.basis_of_schedule_impact: Schedule impact mapped to A1900 Main construction / fabrication / assembly with O/M/P delay 20/70/180 days and critical path sensitivity.

benchmarks.why: Remote operations, mass constraints, launch windows and harsh environment.
Qualification, launch integration and commissioning sequence.
Space confidence improves fastest through test evidence and heritage.

scenario_comparison.label: Faster
scenario_comparison.why: Parallel design/procurement, acceleration, premium logistics and higher interface risk.

scenario_comparison.label: Cheaper
scenario_comparison.why: Value engineering, tighter scope and procurement competition, with schedule/quality exposure.

scenario_comparison.label: Lower Risk
scenario_comparison.why: More surveys, assurance, stage gates, contingency and schedule buffers.

scenario_comparison.label: Premium
scenario_comparison.why: Best assurance, independent review, early procurement and high-confidence governance.

scenario_comparison.label: Investor
scenario_comparison.why: Investment-framing case with transparent risk and commercial challenge.

scenario_comparison.label: Survival
scenario_comparison.why: Minimum viable scope, warning-heavy, high residual risk.

launch_demo_script: Open with: 'Give me any project on Earth or in Space.'
Type the project into CASEY and hit Generate Full Intelligence Pack.
Show the executive dashboard: cost, schedule, risk, confidence and top drivers.
Switch to Monte Carlo: show QCRA/QSRA P-curves and tornado drivers linked to activities.
Show scenarios: Faster, Cheaper, Lower Risk and Premium with why each changed.
Open Output Centre: Excel, Risk CSV, XER, Word, PDF, PPTX and ZIP are ready.
Close with: 'Traditional advisory takes weeks. CASEY gives the first board-grade view in seconds.'
red_flags: Confidence below board-comfort threshold: improve scope definition, benchmark evidence and supplier quotes.
Risk rating requires executive sponsor review and quantified mitigation plan before commitment.
Space programme: verify TRL, launch manifest, mass margins and operations concept before commercial reliance.
board_challenge_questions: What evidence supports the P50 cost and P80 confidence?
Which five risks create most contingency?
Which activities drive the QSRA finish-date risk?
What data would increase confidence before approval?
What is the fastest credible lower-risk path?
What flight heritage, TRL and qualification evidence supports the space assumptions?
next_best_actions: Run a risk workshop to validate probability and O/M/P impacts.
Confirm top five CBS cost drivers with benchmark or supplier evidence.
Validate the Level 3/4 schedule logic and critical path assumptions.
Prepare board decision paper with Base/Faster/Cheaper/Lower-Risk cases.
Create confidence improvement plan targeting design maturity, consents and procurement evidence.
